summary: Executed backend + frontend verification for requested iteration (reduced form contract, UI spacing/alignment, timeline, and mobile readability) on public preview URL. All requested flows passed.
action_items: Optional housekeeping: align or archive older backend test files that still validate obsolete payload fields (business_numbers/name_company/checkbox confirmations).
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend and backend are aligned on reduced payload contract (email, business_account_name, phone_numbers, package_type).
/api/inquiries correctly persists reduced payload and returns expected status fields without MongoDB _id leakage.
UI implementation includes sufficient data-testid coverage for critical interactive elements and remains stable on mobile without horizontal overflow.
test_credentials: No auth flow in scope. /app/memory/test_credentials.md exists but contains no credentials.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST inquiry records via /api/inquiries during automated tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated exact hero kicker text, 4-field form with no checkboxes, inquiry submission success, guarantee bullet visibility, package CTA alignment, timeline 01-05, compact section spacing behavior, and mobile no-overflow/readability on the public preview deployment.
rca of the issue: No blocking issue found in requested scope.
